chapter_title.en: Chapter 88 – Description of the milk of the stallion (father)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/209)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/209)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ أَرْضَعَتْ جَارِيَةً وَ لِزَوْجِهَا ابْنٌ مِنْ غَيْرِهَا أَ يَحِلُّ لِلْغُلَامِ ابْنِ زَوْجِهَا أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَ الْجَارِيَةَ الَّتِي أَرْضَعَتْ فَقَالَ اللَّبَنُ لِلْفَحْلِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziiyad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about a woman who breast-feeds a girl and for her husband is a son from someone else. Is it Permissible for the boy, a son of her husband that he marries the girl whom she has breast-fed?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The milk is of the stallion (father)’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who breastfeeds a girl and her husband has a son from another woman if it is lawful for this boy, the son of her husband to marry the girl she has breastfed. He (the Imam) said, ‘The milk is from ‘impregnating agent’ her husband.’”
